---
title: "Tidy Tuesdays"
listing:
  contents: TidyTuesdays
  sort: "date desc"
  date-format: iso
  type: default # default / grid / table
  #fields: [image, date, title, reading-time] # image, reading-time
  categories: false
  feed: false
---

I had done one or two TidyTuesdays last year. I expect to be doing much more in the coming months, in R, Python and most likely D3 (using Quarto). These will be listed below.
